Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: modularize codebase structure

- Extract pages to src/pages/ \(Landing, Features, Pricing, Demo, Profile, Legal pages\)
- Extract dashboard components to src/components/dashboard/ \(AuthModal, Sidebar, etc.\)
- Extract UI components to src/components/ui/ \(Button, Modal, Skeleton, etc.\)
- Extract layout components to src/components/layout/ \(Footer, PageTransition, ErrorBoundary\)
- Extract constants to src/constants/ \(demo data, pricing, design system\)
- Extract config to src/config/ \(Supabase, EmailJS, storage\)
- Extract hooks to src/hooks/ \(useDebounce, useDebouncedCallback\)
- Extract context to src/context/ \(ToastContext\)
- Add STRUCTURE.md documentation for Claude
- Reduce App.jsx from 10749 to 7131 lines \(-34%\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
